## Summary

Describe the change in plain language.

## Maintainer Workflow Affected

Select or describe the workflow this change affects:

- issue triage
- good first issue classification
- PR brief
- release draft
- repository inputs or payload parsing
- CLI or GitHub Actions
- docs or contributor onboarding

## Validation

- [ ] Added or updated tests when behavior changed
- [ ] Updated documentation when CLI, workflows, or outputs changed
- [ ] Updated fixtures when schema or payload expectations changed
- [ ] Kept public outputs stable or documented the migration

## Reviewer Focus

Call out the highest-risk area, reviewer checklist, or migration concern.

## Release Note

Provide a short release note snippet if the change should be mentioned in release drafting.
